pages.text: $(o)"What you take from the earth-mother, you repay with your flesh."$()$(br2)$(4)FORBIDDEN.$() A contract scroll: the caster always pays, and pays first.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Mine up to $(l)64$() stone-class blocks (incl. ores) in a $(l)9×9 single layer$() directly below the core.$(br2)Drops are $(l)delivered to the core$().$(br2)$(l)Caster$() suffers Wither I (30s) — "Mining Scar".$(br2)Cost: $(l)9000$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Massive ore-yield, but Wither lockout for 30s — bring milk or regen pots.$(br2)Combo with Oreblood Revelation: scout, then quarry.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 5 Primordial$() — Forbidden magic was never meant for mortal hands.
